source.title: ANF01. The Apostolic Fathers with Justin Martyr and Irenaeus

verses.book: Other Fragments from the Lost Writings of Justin
verses.text: Neither shall light ever be darkness as long as light exists, nor shall the truth of the things pertaining to us be controverted.

verses.book: Other Fragments from the Lost Writings of Justin
verses.text: For truth is that than which nothing is more powerful.

verses.book: Other Fragments from the Lost Writings of Justin
verses.text: Every one who might speak the truth, and speaks it not, shall be judged by God.—Manuscript and works of John of Damascus.
